division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
article_title: Refusal of Registration for Nonpayment of Toll Evasion Penalties
text:
(a) The department shall assess a fee for the recording of the notice of delinquent toll evasion violation, which is given to the department by a processing agency pursuant to Section 40267, in an amount, as determined by the department, that is sufficient to provide a total amount equal to at least its actual costs of administering Sections 4770, 4771, 4774, and 4775, and administering the system described in Section 4456.2.

(b) This section shall become operative January 1, 2018.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 6.5. Refusal of Registration for Nonpayment of Toll Evasion Penalties [4770 - 4775]
##### § 4773

(a) The department shall assess a fee for the recording of the notice of delinquent toll evasion violation, which is given to the department by a processing agency pursuant to Section 40267, in an amount, as determined by the department, that is sufficient to provide a total amount equal to at least its actual costs of administering Sections 4770, 4771, 4774, and 4775, and administering the system described in Section 4456.2.

(b) This section shall become operative January 1, 2018.

*(Repealed (in Sec. 13) and added by Stats. 2016, Ch. 90, Sec. 14. (AB 516) Effective January 1, 2017. Section operative January 1, 2018, by its own provisions.)*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This section shall become operative January 1, 2018.
